summary: Iteration 21 - All backend APIs and frontend features tested successfully. 19/19 backend tests passed. Mobile floating buttons correctly positioned side-by-side. Admin Kunden-Tab customer creation and portal access working.
seed_data_creation: Created test customers with TEST_ prefix during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 tested new features: POST /api/admin/customers, POST /api/admin/customers/portal-access, GET /api/admin/memory/agents, GET /api/admin/memory/by-agent/{agent_id}, GET /api/admin/memory/search, POST /api/admin/customer-memory/{email}/facts. All APIs working correctly. Mobile floating buttons (WhatsApp + Chat) are side-by-side at bottom=120px with z-index=910. Admin Kunden-Tab has 'Neuer Kunde' button that opens form with fields: Vorname, Nachname, E-Mail, Unternehmen, Telefon, Branche. Portal access button generates magic link URL.

backend_apis.POST /api/admin/customers: PASS - Creates customer with lead, contact, and memory entry
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/customers/portal-access: PASS - Generates magic link URL with expiration
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/memory/agents: PASS - Returns all 13 agent IDs (emergent_build, intake, research, etc.)
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/memory/by-agent/{agent_id: PASS - Returns memory entries for specific agent
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/memory/search: PASS - Text search across memory entries
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/customer-memory/{email}/: PASS - Adds memory fact with agent_id, verification_status

mobile_floating_buttons.side_by_side: PASS - y difference 0px, 8px gap between buttons

desktop_landing.whatsapp: PASS - Vertical on left side (flush left)

admin_kunden_tab.customer_form_fields: PASS - Vorname, Nachname, E-Mail, Unternehmen, Telefon, Branche
admin_kunden_tab.save_customer: PASS - Creates customer and closes form
admin_kunden_tab.customer_list: PASS - Shows all customers with columns
admin_kunden_tab.portal_access_button: PASS - Generates magic link (clipboard error is browser security, not app bug)

mocked_apis_list: GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key used instead of DeepSeek
